name: MASTER OPS BUILD — AGENT SWARM EXECUTION
description: Build unified PRINTMAXX_MASTER_OPS.xlsx with all playbook data, alpha thesis, browser/proxy stack. Each task spawns 3-7 parallel agents via TeamCreate.

tasks.name: Build unified XLSX (11 sheets)
tasks.description: Run builder, collect data from LEDGER, validate output. 3 agents: data collector + builder + validator.

tasks.name: Alpha ops integration
tasks.description: Scan ALPHA_STAGING for new APPROVED entries. Integrate into ops, tech stack, methods. Zero Waste content. 5 agents.

tasks.name: Deep playbook expansion
tasks.description: Gap analysis: 115 ops vs 22 playbooks. Write new playbooks for top gaps. Update stale entries. 4 agents.

tasks.name: Browser & proxy stack refresh
tasks.description: Sync accounts, check tool freshness, update integration flow. 3 agents.

tasks.name: Priority rerank via self-test + revenue
tasks.description: Run self_test.py, analyze revenue, rerank priority launch queue. 3 agents.

tasks.name: Content & distribution package
tasks.description: Zero Waste: tweets, newsletter, Gumroad spec, Reddit posts, Medium article from build findings. 5 agents.

tasks.name: Rebuild & validate final XLSX
tasks.description: Apply all updates from T1-T6, rebuild XLSX, validate. 2 agents.

tasks.name: Session handoff & CLAUDE.md update
tasks.description: Update all session state files. 1 agent.
